statement: The ACSC/ASD Information Security Manual (ISM) current release is the March 2026 edition; ASD revises the ISM roughly quarterly.

evidence.quote: Information security manual Last updated: March 2026
This update adopted language from mapped controls within the Information security manual (ISM) to ensure consistency

falsifier: A cyber.gov.au ISM page or OSCAL release dated later than March 2026 at retrieval would falsify 'current'.
